meta.title: The Realignment Ep. 32: The COVID-19 Security Challenge
meta.description:
Hudson scholars Walter Russell Mead, Rebeccah Heinrichs, and John Walters join The Realignment to discuss how the U.S., and the world at large, is reassessing national interests and national security in light of the COVID-19 outbreak.

Subscribe to be notified about new episodes every week:

Spotify: https://spoti.fi/2Kb1kyz
Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast...
Google Podcasts: https://bit.ly/2Ox1d4o
Stitcher: https://bit.ly/2OAjqy9

Learn more about The Realignment at: https://www.hudson.org/
